name: safety-essentials
description: Essential safety hooks for Claude Code — block destructive commands and protect sensitive files
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block destructive commands
hooks.description: Blocks rm -rf, drop table, and truncate commands

hook.command: if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'rm -rf|drop table|truncate'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: destructive command (rm -rf, drop table, or truncate) detected"}'; fi

hooks.name: Block force push to main/master
hooks.description: Prevents git push --force to main or master branches

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*--force.*(main|master)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: force push to main/master. This can destroy remote history."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block git reset --hard
hooks.description: Prevents git reset --hard which discards uncommitted changes

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git reset --hard'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: git reset --hard discards uncommitted changes. Use git stash or commit first."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block secrets in commits
hooks.description: Prevents git add on .env, credentials, and key files

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git add.*(\.(env|pem|key)|credentials|secret)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: attempting to stage a file that may contain secrets (.env, .pem, .key, credentials). Review before committing."}'; fi; }
